Class SubtermGenerator<Goal extends ProofGoal<@NonNull Goal>>

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.strategy.costbased.termgenerator.SubtermGenerator<Goal>
All Implemented Interfaces:
TermGenerator<Goal>
public abstract class SubtermGenerator<Goal extends ProofGoal<@NonNull Goal>> extends Object implements TermGenerator<Goal>
Term generator that enumerates the sub-terms or sub-formulas of a given term. Similarly to RecSubTermFeature, a term feature can be given that determines when traversal should be stopped, i.e., when one should not descend further into a term.

  • Method Details

    • leftTraverse

      public static <Goal extends ProofGoal<@NonNull Goal>> TermGenerator<Goal> leftTraverse(ProjectionToTerm<Goal> cTerm, TermFeature cond)
      Left-traverse the subterms of a term in depth-first order. Each term is returned before its proper subterms.

    • rightTraverse

      public static <Goal extends ProofGoal<@NonNull Goal>> TermGenerator<Goal> rightTraverse(ProjectionToTerm<Goal> cTerm, TermFeature cond)
      Right-traverse the subterms of a term in depth-first order. Each term is returned before its proper subterms.
